message:
feat(c-interop): fix sqlite3 and zlib C interop integration

- Add type inference for sqlite3 (connect returns sqlite_connection)
- Add type inference for zlib (compress/decompress return string, crc32/adler32 return int)
- Add sqlite_connection and sqlite_cursor NativeTypes
- Fix sqlite3.connect to call C interop function directly
- Fix zlib codegen variable naming to avoid shadowing
- Add function metadata for sqlite3, numpy, zlib to prevent allocator injection
